scripts.build: npm run build -w @web-midi-lab/midi-core && npm run build -w @web-midi-lab/transport && npm run build -w @web-midi-lab/scheduler && npm run build -w @web-midi-lab/midi-monitor && npm run build -w @web-midi-lab/euclidean-harmony-sequencer
scripts.test: npm run test -w @web-midi-lab/midi-core && npm run test -w @web-midi-lab/transport && npm run test -w @web-midi-lab/scheduler && npm run test -w @web-midi-lab/midi-monitor && npm run test -w @web-midi-lab/euclidean-harmony-sequencer
